l1-background.description: Primary page background for the outermost container
l1-background.usage: Use for main app shell, page background, and root containers
l1-background.dontUse: Avoid for cards, modals, or nested elements - use l2 or l3 instead

l2-background.description: Secondary background for cards and elevated surfaces
l2-background.usage: Use for cards, panels, sidebars, and first-level nested containers
l2-background.dontUse: Avoid for deeply nested elements - use l3 instead

l3-background.description: Tertiary background for nested elements within cards
l3-background.usage: Use for inputs, dropdowns, and elements nested inside l2 containers

l1-background-hover.usage: Use for interactive elements on l1 background surfaces

l2-background-hover.usage: Use for interactive elements on l2 background surfaces

l3-background-hover.usage: Use for interactive elements on l3 background surfaces

l1-foreground.description: Primary text color for l1 backgrounds
l1-foreground.usage: Use for headings and primary text on l1 surfaces

l1-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for interactive elements on l1

l2-foreground.description: Secondary text color for l2 backgrounds
l2-foreground.usage: Use for body text and secondary content on l2 surfaces

l2-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for interactive elements on l2

l3-foreground.description: Tertiary text color for l3 backgrounds and muted text
l3-foreground.usage: Use for captions, labels, and less prominent text

l3-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for interactive elements on l3

l1-border.description: Border color for elements on l1 backgrounds
l1-border.usage: Use for dividers and borders separating l1 content

l2-border.description: Border color for elements on l2 backgrounds
l2-border.usage: Use for card borders and dividers within cards

l3-border.description: Border color for elements on l3 backgrounds
l3-border.usage: Use for input borders and nested element dividers

primary-background.usage: Use for primary buttons, CTAs, and main interactive elements

primary-background-hover.description: Hover state for primary action elements

primary-foreground.description: Text color for primary action elements
primary-foreground.usage: Use for text on primary buttons and CTAs

primary-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for primary action elements

secondary-background.usage: Use for secondary buttons and less prominent actions

secondary-background-hover.description: Hover state for secondary action elements

secondary-foreground.description: Text color for secondary action elements

secondary-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for secondary action elements

success-background.usage: Use for success states, confirmations, and positive actions

success-foreground.description: Text color for success action elements

success-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for success elements

warning-background.usage: Use for warning states and cautionary actions

warning-foreground.description: Text color for warning action elements

warning-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for warning elements

danger-background.usage: Use for destructive actions, errors, and critical warnings

danger-foreground.description: Text color for danger action elements

danger-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for danger elements

callout-primary-background.usage: Use for info callouts, tips, and general announcements

callout-primary-title.description: Title text color for informational callouts

callout-primary-description.description: Description text color for informational callouts

callout-success-background.usage: Use for success messages and positive confirmations

callout-success-title.description: Title text color for success callouts

callout-success-description.description: Description text color for success callouts

callout-warning-background.usage: Use for warning messages and cautionary information

callout-warning-title.description: Title text color for warning callouts

callout-warning-description.description: Description text color for warning callouts

callout-error-background.usage: Use for error messages and critical information

callout-error-title.description: Title text color for error callouts

callout-error-description.description: Description text color for error callouts

accent-primary.usage: Use for links, highlights, and brand elements

accent-primary-foreground.description: Text color on primary accent backgrounds

accent-forest.description: Green accent for success and positive indicators
accent-forest.usage: Use for success badges, positive trends, and status indicators

accent-forest-foreground.description: Text color on forest accent backgrounds

accent-amber.description: Yellow/orange accent for warnings and attention
accent-amber.usage: Use for warning badges, pending states, and attention indicators

accent-amber-foreground.description: Text color on amber accent backgrounds

accent-cherry.description: Red accent for errors and critical states
accent-cherry.usage: Use for error badges, negative trends, and critical indicators

accent-cherry-foreground.description: Text color on cherry accent backgrounds

accent-aqua.usage: Use for info badges, links, and data visualization

accent-aqua-foreground.description: Text color on aqua accent backgrounds

accent-sakura.usage: Use for tags, labels, and data visualization variety

accent-sakura-foreground.description: Text color on sakura accent backgrounds

accent-sienna.usage: Use for tags, labels, and data visualization variety

accent-sienna-foreground.description: Text color on sienna accent backgrounds

ghost-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for ghost buttons

action-border-hover.description: Hover border color for action buttons

action-foreground-hover.description: Hover text color for action buttons

callout-sienna-title.description: Title text color for sienna callouts

callout-sienna-description.description: Description text color for sienna callouts

callout-aqua-title.description: Title text color for aqua callouts

callout-aqua-description.description: Description text color for aqua callouts
